8.5.39.en: v8.5.39: CRITICAL FIX - category must be string not array (Athom server requirement). Remove api field + homey:manager:api permission. Aligns with stable-v5 structure. Root cause of all Processing failed builds.

8.5.38.en: v8.5.38: Fix Processing failed — remove invalid icon field from app.json, use assets/icon.svg as per Athom SDK3 spec (App.js:618). Also corrects icon hash computation for Athom server.

8.5.36.en: v8.5.36: Critical fix for app crash on startup (AggregateError). Restored all 360 Zigbee manufacturer names. New soil sensor support (_TZE284_0ints6wl).

8.5.35.en: v8.5.34: Critical fix, Fingerprint conflicts, Empty manufacturer names, Driver count, App.json

8.5.34.en: v8.5.34: Critical fix restores all 360 Zigbee driver manufacturer names, resolving the AggregateError crash. 4,361 fingerprint conflicts resolved.

8.5.33.en: CRITICAL FIX: Restore all static manufacturerName fingerprints in driver.compose.json (156 drivers fixed). Fix category to array format. Fix all image paths. Inject fingerprints from data/fingerprints.json (126k entries). Merge PR #345 garage_door_opener DP3. Process Issues #322 #324 #328 #329 #333 #334 #337 #339 #340.
8.5.33.fr: CORRECTIF CRITIQUE: Restauration de tous les manufacturerName statiques dans driver.compose.json (156 drivers). Fix category en array. Fix chemins images. Injection depuis data/fingerprints.json (126k entrées). Merge PR #345 garage_door_opener DP3. Traitement Issues #322 #324 #328 #329 #333 #334 #337 #339 #340.

8.5.30.en: v8.5.29: Garage Door Opener, 122 new fingerprints, Plug Energy Monitor, Garage Door Opener, Updated to **412 drivers** and **7449 fingerprints** total.

8.5.29.en: Garage door opener fix: DP3 state now properly applied to Homey. 122 new fingerprints added from community sync.  total.

8.5.28.en: v8.5.28: . New soil sensor support (_TZE284_0ints6wl). General stability improvements.

8.5.27.en: Removed SmartThings 2 integration. Monthly  adds 413 drivers and 3306 validated fingerprints. Bug fix for AggregateError on app startup.

8.5.26.en: v8.5.26: 122 new fingerprints from community sync. Fixed 2Client crash.  total.

8.5.24.en: v8.5.24: 122 new fingerprints from community sync, crash fix for app initialization, and general stability improvements.

8.5.22.en: v8.5.22: 122 new fingerprints from community sync. New devices: soil sensor (_TZE284_0ints6wl). Bug fixes: auto-off timer, button triple click, overload, and radio presence triggers now work correctly.

8.5.21.en: v8.5.21: . New soil sensor support (_TZE284_0ints6wl). Fixed 39 broken YAML .

8.5.20.en: v8.5.20: . New soil sensor support. Removed stale fingerprints. General stability improvements.

8.5.17.en: v8.5.17: Added support for new soil sensor (_TZE284_0ints6wl / TS0601). Minor improvements and stability enhancements.

8.1.13.en: v8.1.12: Fixed crash in DeviceIdentificationDatabase that could cause app instability during device lookup., Added 298 new fingerprints from Z2M, ZHA, community reports, and JohanBendz contributions., Total: 413 drivers, 3296 fingerprints validated., rain_sensor: capability handling update.

8.1.12.en: v8.1.12 — 298 new fingerprints added, DeviceIdentificationDatabase crash fix, 413 drivers, 3296 FPs validated.

8.1.11.en: Bug fix: air purifier smoke and siren flow cards no longer crash on init. 298 new fingerprints added across drivers.

8.1.10.en: Bug fixes: contact_sensor_curtain, contact_sensor_dimmer, wall_dimmer_1gang_1way validation errors resolved. Duplicate flow card warnings eliminated globally.

8.5.37.en: v8.5.36: Critical fix, Root cleanup, New device support, Fingerprint database, CI
